title: Legendary Football Tribute Sports Poster AI
sourceTitle: Legendary Football Tribute Sports Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cristiano Ronaldo-inspired legendary football tribute poster language rebuilt around Noah Varela, invented left-footed winger with short silver-black curls and angular face. Subject: Noah Varela, invented left-footed winger with short silver-black curls and angular face dominates the composition as a heroic number-7 football figure with intense upward gaze, determined expression, championship aura, and powerful victory energy. Scene: Dramatic stadium atmosphere with championship crowd depth, explosive brush strokes, ink textures, sparks, paint splashes, and a premium collectible sports-magazine cover finish. Composition: Close-up hero portrait or celebration-poster structure with the athlete dominating the frame, iconic number 7 integrated into the design, bold headline typography, dynamic diagonal splashes, and strong poster hierarchy. Signature Elements: Heroic upward gaze, number 7 motif, vintage grunge sports texture, paint splashes, ink strokes, golden aura, packed stadium energy, SIUUU-style celebration language, and premium football GOAT tribute composition. Style: Ultra-detailed digital sports illustration with vintage grunge poster texture, Cristiano Ronaldo-inspired football legend energy, SIUUU celebration intensity, sports marketing polish, realistic skin detail, cinematic contrast, and ArtStation-quality collectible artwork. Color Palette: Portuguese red, deep black, metallic gold, cream distressed texture, stadium shadow tones, golden accents, and high-contrast championship lighting. Lighting: Cinematic stadium lighting with high-contrast shadows, dramatic spotlight, golden rim highlights, floating sparks, and explosive aura around the athlete. Typography: RISE / STORM / LEGEND appears as bold motivational poster typography, integrated with the number 7 and brushstroke layout. Restrictions: Keep the athlete coherent, poster hierarchy strong, typography readable, and number 7 integrated cleanly;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
